title: Iranikulam Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Iranikulam Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Iranikulam Sree Mahadeva Temple is in Iranikulam, Mala in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala.
overview.description: Iranikulam Sree Mahadeva Temple is in Iranikulam, Mala in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala. The temple has two main deities, Thekkadathappan and Vadakkedathappan, both versions of Shiva. The south shrine is generally considered to be the shrine of Shiva. The presiding deities of the north shrine are Shiva, Parvati and Subramanya.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kuzhur
topPlaces.description: Kuzhur is a small village in the southern end of Thrissur district of the Indian state of Kerala. The old Jewish settlement of Mala is the nearest town.

topPlaces.name: Madathumpady
topPlaces.description: Madathumpady is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. This village consist of 3 wards in Poyya grama panchayat (7,8,9).

topPlaces.name: Kuruvilassery
topPlaces.description: Kuruvilassery is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kakkulissery
topPlaces.description: Kakkulissery is a small village in the southern end of Thrissur district in Chalakkudy taluka of Kerala, India. The language spoken by the majority of people in this area is Malayalam.

topPlaces.name: Eravathur
topPlaces.description: Eravathur is a small village situated towards the south end of Thrissur district of Kerala state in India. This village is situated nearly 40 km (25 mi) away from Ernakulam city and nearly 45 km (28 mi) from Thrissur city.

topPlaces.name: KochuKadavu
topPlaces.description: Kochukadavu is a village in southern part of Thrissur district. Which is situated in Kuzhoor Grama Panjayath,Kochukadavu is a small village located near the Chalakudy River in the Thrissur district of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Mala, Kerala
topPlaces.description: Mala is a small town in Thrissur district of Kerala state, India. There is a Jewish synagogue in Mala town.

topPlaces.name: Poovathussery
topPlaces.description: Poovathussery is a village in the border between Ernakulam district and Thrissur district of Kerala, India. It is situated on the banks of Chalakudy River and has several paddy lands and coconut trees.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Iranikulam Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Iranikulam Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Iranikulam Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (15 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (26 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Iranikulam Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Iranikulam Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Iranikulam Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Iranikulam Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Iranikulam Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kuzhur, Madathumpady, Kuruvilassery, Kakkulissery, Eravathur.
